## Problem Or Workflow Gap

Describe the workflow you are trying to improve.

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior, command shape, or user experience you want to see.

## Example Usage

Show the command, script snippet, or session flow you have in mind.

```powershell
# Example
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or alternative you have already tried.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, links, or related issues if they help explain the request.
